tactics: deceptive irrelevant details;plausible but false assumptions
required_patterns: replica divergence after a clean failover rehearsal with unsynced host clocks;deterministic repro
prompt: Two replicas disagree after a clean failover rehearsal. The loudest error appears before the data drift, but the timestamps came from different hosts and one warning stream is known to be noisy. Explain the debugging path and the safest mitigation stance.

tactics: hidden cost/risk tradeoffs;plausible but false assumptions
required_patterns: trial-start gains versus refunds and call-center wait after ranking changes;lagged
prompt: After a ranking change, trial starts rose right away. A week later refunds rose and call-center wait time worsened. Marketing wants to scale the change and says the revenue bump proves causality. Assess what to do.

required_patterns: VIP complaints, regional flapping, and rollback load in a throttled incident;blast radius
prompt: Graphs improved after throttling a struggling service, but VIP complaints keep climbing, one region is still flapping, and rollback could overload a shared dependency. Recommend the next incident move and make the risk tradeoffs explicit.

required_patterns: emergency analyst access during outages under attributable regional controls;audit
prompt: Operations wants emergency analyst access during outages because investigations are too slow. Audit says access must stay attributable and region-bound. A narrow exception looks easy and leadership wants it this week. Assess the safest path.
